docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: THE COURT ORDERS THAT RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $110.00 US CURRENCY BE RELEASED TO CLAIMANT PILAR LABOURE. IT IS FURTHER ORDERED THAT RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $445.00 US CURRENCY, PLUS INTEREST SINCE THE DATE OF DEPOSIT, IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PURSUANT TO THE PROVISIONS OF HEALTH AND SAFETY CODE SECTION 11470 ET SEQ. AS AGAINST ANY AND ALL INTERESTED PARTIES AND BE DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY THE PROVISIONS OF HEALTH AND SAFETY CODE SECTION 11489 - SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIF (FOREFEITURE) ALSO FILED BY CLAIMANT LABOURNE, PILAR
